author: Luke
headline: Two calls. Two windows. One catalyst-driven bet on a misread recovery.
summary: Down ~70% from its high on GLP-1 regulatory fears that are already resolving. Novo lawsuit settled, distribution deal live, $1.15B international acquisition closing in weeks. Two short-term call options — May 1 and June 7 — positioned ahead of Q1 earnings on May 11.

author: Luke
headline: The SaaS selloff has created a potential entry point — but four conditions must hold.
summary: Down 45% YTD despite beating Q1 estimates and raising guidance. The market is pricing in structural AI disruption that may not materialise on the relevant timeframe. At 23x forward earnings on a 20%+ growth, 35% FCF margin business, the valuation math looks asymmetric for a patient buyer.

author: Luke
headline: The bull case requires four gates to clear — in sequence.
summary: Vancouver-based micro-cap oil explorer betting everything on the M47 Block in SE Turkey's Cudi-Gabar province. At ~C$6M market cap the stock prices in near-zero success. A successful discovery could justify C$50–200M+. The four gates define the path between those outcomes.
